languages.text: {n}Вольный Торговец застывает, пораженный вашей наглостью.{/n} "Я дозволил вам говорить на совете, и это — ваши слова? Прекратите нести вздор".

traits.locale_text: "Что? Это чистый вздор, и я не знаю, рассмеяться или рассердиться".

languages.text: {n}The Rogue Trader stills, astounded by your insolence.{/n} "I allowed you to speak at the council, and this is what you have to say? Stop talking nonsense."
languages.original_text: {n}Вольный Торговец застывает, пораженный вашей наглостью.{/n} "Я дозволил вам говорить на совете, и это — ваши слова? Прекратите нести вздор".

traits.locale_text: {n}The Rogue Trader stills, astounded by your insolence.{/n} "I allowed you to speak at the council, and this is what you have to say? Stop talking nonsense."
{n}The Rogue Trader stills, astounded by your insolence.{/n} "I allowed you to speak at the council, and this is what you have to say? Stop talking nonsense."
{n}The Rogue Trader stills, astounded by your insolence.{/n} "I allowed you to speak at the council, and this is what you have to say? Stop talking nonsense."

languages.text: {n}行商浪人僵在那里，显然被你的无礼震惊了。{/n}“我准允你在议会上发言，可你却口出狂言？给我住口。”
languages.original_text: {n}The Rogue Trader stills, astounded by your insolence.{/n} "I allowed you to speak at the council, and this is what you have to say? Stop talking nonsense."

traits.locale_text: {n}行商浪人僵在那里，显然被你的无礼震惊了。{/n}“我准允你在议会上发言，可你却口出狂言？给我住口。”

languages.text: {n}Le libre-marchand s'immobilise, choqué de votre insolence.{/n} « Je vous autorise à vous adresser au conseil, et c'est tout ce que vous trouvez à dire ? Gardez vos âneries pour vous. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Rogue Trader stills, astounded by your insolence.{/n} "I allowed you to speak at the council, and this is what you have to say? Stop talking nonsense."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le libre-marchand s'immobilise, choqué de votre insolence.{/n} « Je vous autorise à vous adresser au conseil, et c'est tout ce que vous trouvez à dire ? Gardez vos âneries pour vous. »

languages.text: {n}El Comerciante Independiente se detiene, asombrado por tu insolencia.{/n} «Le permito que hable en mi consejo ¿y esto es lo que tiene que decir? Déjese de estupideces».
languages.original_text: {n}The Rogue Trader stills, astounded by your insolence.{/n} "I allowed you to speak at the council, and this is what you have to say? Stop talking nonsense."

traits.locale_text: {n}El Comerciante Independiente se detiene, asombrado por tu insolencia.{/n} «Le permito que hable en mi consejo ¿y esto es lo que tiene que decir? Déjese de estupideces».

languages.text: {n}Küstahlığın karşısında şaşkına dönen Hür Tacir donup kalıyor.{/n} "Konseyde konuşmana izin verdim. Sense bunu mu söylüyorsun? Saçmalama."
languages.original_text: {n}The Rogue Trader stills, astounded by your insolence.{/n} "I allowed you to speak at the council, and this is what you have to say? Stop talking nonsense."

traits.locale_text: {n}Küstahlığın karşısında şaşkına dönen Hür Tacir donup kalıyor.{/n} "Konseyde konuşmana izin verdim. Sense bunu mu söylüyorsun? Saçmalama."

languages.text: {n}Von deiner Kühnheit erstaunt, verstummt der Freihändler.{/n} "Ich habe Euch gestattet, vor dem Rat zu sprechen, und das ist es, was Ihr zu sagen habt? Hört auf, Unsinn zu reden."
languages.original_text: {n}The Rogue Trader stills, astounded by your insolence.{/n} "I allowed you to speak at the council, and this is what you have to say? Stop talking nonsense."

traits.locale_text: {n}Von deiner Kühnheit erstaunt, verstummt der Freihändler.{/n} "Ich habe Euch gestattet, vor dem Rat zu sprechen, und das ist es, was Ihr zu sagen habt? Hört auf, Unsinn zu reden."

languages.text: {n}ローグトレーダーはあなたの無礼さに驚いて静まった。「お前を会議で発言させても、こんなことを言うのか。戯言を言わないで。」{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Rogue Trader stills, astounded by your insolence.{/n} "I allowed you to speak at the council, and this is what you have to say? Stop talking nonsense."

traits.locale_text: {n}ローグトレーダーはあなたの無礼さに驚いて静まった。「お前を会議で発言させても、こんなことを言うのか。戯言を言わないで。」{/n}
